originalTitle: Inflation, Bank of America, Wells Fargo, Goldman, ASML, J&J, and More to Watch This Week
summary: Big banks kick off earnings season this week, which will also bring reports from GE Aerospace, Netflix, and Taiwan Semi. In economic news, we’ll get the consumer and producer price indexes, and retail sales data.
content: Big banks kick off earnings season this week, which will also bring reports from GE Aerospace, Netflix, and Taiwan Semi. In economic news, we’ll get the consumer and producer price indexes, and retail sales data.
chineseTitle: 通胀、美国银行、富国银行、高盛、ASML、强生等本周值得关注
chineseSummary: 大型银行的财报季将于本周拉开帷幕，通用电气航空航天公司、Netflix 和台积电也将发布财报。 In economic news, we’ll get the consumer and producer price indexes, and retail sales data.
chineseContent: 大型银行的财报季将于本周拉开帷幕，通用电气航空航天公司、Netflix 和台积电也将发布财报。 In economic news, we’ll get the consumer and producer price indexes, and retail sales data.
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于财经市场信号，适合用于观察利率、汇率、股债商品、金融机构和宏观政策变化。
